subject: Accounting
title: Operating Expenses
description: A short lesson to help you apply Operating Expenses.

hook.text: Rent, salaries, marketing, utilities—these aren't in the product but still cost money.

buildup.text: Operating expenses cover everything needed to run the business beyond direct production.

discovery.text: Subtract operating expenses from gross profit to get operating income—the real engine metric.

twist.text: A startup burning through cash on marketing may show negative operating income for years.

climax.text: Investors tolerate losses early if they believe operating leverage will eventually flip the numbers.

punchline.text: Revenue minus everything: that's operating income.

quiz.question: What are operating expenses?
options: Costs to run the business beyond production
